svg.text: SYNTHETIC DEMO — NOT A REAL FILING
SUM-130
SUMMONS
(UNLAWFUL DETAINER — EVICTION)
(CITACIÓN JUDICIAL — RETENCIÓN ILÍCITA DE UN INMUEBLE — DESALOJO)
FOR COURT USE ONLY
(SÓLO PARA USO DE LA CORTE)
FILED — Superior Court
Alameda County · 06/05/2026
NOTICE TO DEFENDANT (AVISO AL DEMANDADO):
MARIA GONZALEZ; and DOES 1 to 5
YOU ARE BEING SUED BY PLAINTIFF (LO ESTÁ DEMANDANDO EL DEMANDANTE):
SKYLINE RIDGE APARTMENTS, LLC
NOTICE! You have been sued. The court may decide against you without your being
heard unless you respond within 10 court days.
¡AVISO! Lo han demandado. Si no responde dentro de 10 días de corte, la corte puede
decidir en su contra sin escuchar su versión.
You have 10 CALENDAR/COURT DAYS after this summons and legal papers are served on
you to file a written response (an Answer, form UD-105) at this court and have a copy
served on the plaintiff. A letter or phone call will not protect you. If you do not file
your response on time, you may lose the case by default, and your wages, money, and
property may be taken without further warning from the court.
The name and address of the court is (El nombre y dirección de la corte es):
SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF ALAMEDA
René C. Davidson Courthouse, 1225 Fallon Street, Oakland, CA 94612
CASE NUMBER (Número del Caso):
The name, address, and telephone number of plaintiff's attorney is:
Harlan Vance, Esq. (SBN 204118), Vance & Croft LLP
500 Harrison Street, Suite 210, Oakland, CA 94607 · (510) 555-0173
The complaint (form UD-100) alleges (La demanda alega):
☒ Nonpayment of rent — amount demanded in the 3-day notice: $4,180.00
☐ Other tenancy violation
Premises: 2240 Edgewater Drive, Apt. 4C, Oakland, CA 94606
Date (Fecha): June 5, 2026
Clerk (Secretario): A. Romero, Deputy
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS
1. I served the Summons and Complaint on the defendant as follows:
☒ a. by PERSONAL SERVICE. I personally delivered the documents to the defendant.
☐ b. by substituted service. ☐ c. by posting and mailing.
2. Date of service (Fecha en que se entregó): June 8, 2026
3. Person who served papers: D. Whitfield, Reg. Process Server, Alameda Co. #2024-118
Form Adopted for Mandatory Use · Judicial Council of California · SUM-130 [Rev. January 1, 2025]
Code of Civil Procedure §§ 412.20, 415.46, 1167
DEMO DATA
